arts.ttl: Manchester City v Inter: Champions League – live
arts.sum: Champions League updates from the 8pm BST kick-off Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | And email Scott City make four changes to the team that started the 2-1 win over Brentford. Rodri, Bernardo Silva, Joško Gvardiol and Rúben Dias come in for Mateo Kovačić, İlkay Gündoğan, John Stones and Kyle Walker. Manchester City: Ederson, Akanji, Dias, Gvardiol, Lewis, Rodri, Savio, Bernardo Silva, De Bruyne, Grealish, Haaland. Subs: Ortega, Carson, Walker, Stones, Kovacic, Doku, Gundogan, Matheus Luiz, Foden, McAtee. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man City change four for Inter visit LIVE!
arts.sum: Avoid defeat against Inter tonight, and Slovan Bratislava in early October, and City will equal the longest unbeaten streak in Champions League history (25).
